/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/fuseAtlas.dir/fuseAtlas.cxx.o -o ../bin/fuseAtlas  -lstdc++fs ../lib/libioWrapper.a ../lib/libRecognizedBundles.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 ../lib/libAtlasBundles.a -lstdc++fs ../lib/libBundlesData.a ../lib/libBundlesMinf.a ../lib/libNiftiImage.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
